## Summary

Describe the problem and the change.

## Validation

- [ ] `colcon build --symlink-install --cmake-args -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Release`
- [ ] Tests or a relevant runtime check were performed
- [ ] ROS topics, frames and QoS changes are documented when applicable

## Checklist

- [ ] No generated build/install/log files are included
- [ ] Upstream attribution and Apache-2.0 notices are preserved
- [ ] Documentation was updated when behavior changed
